movie.actors: Joshua Leonard, Jordan Ladd, Natasha Lyonne, Lance Henriksen
movie.plot: The psychiatric intern Clark Stevens comes to Cunningham Hall, a mental healthy facility administrated by Dr. Franks, for a training period before his graduation in medical college. He gets close to the resident Sara and to Ben London, a dangerous patient lodged in cell 44 in the basement of the clinic. Clark becomes intrigued with a boy, who seems to be a ghost, and finds that Dr. Franks does not use real medication in the patients. A further investigation shows hidden dark secrets in the clinic.
movie.title: Madhouse
movie.writer: William Butler (story and screenplay), Aaron Strongoni (story)
